channel.title: Professional Development on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Professional Development on simeononsecurity

item.title: Information Technology Career Playbook: From Help Desk to IT Director
item.category: "IT career" , "information technology" , "career playbook" , "IT certifications" , "technology jobs" , "career guidance" , "professional development"
item.description: A comprehensive guide to launching, growing, and advancing your Information Technology career. Covers IT specializations, certifications, job search strategies, salaries, and team leadership.

item.title: Module 1: How ATS Systems Work — Why Good Resumes Disappear
item.category: "Career Development" , "Resume Writing" , "Job Search" , "Professional Development"
item.description: Understand how Applicant Tracking Systems score and filter resumes before any human sees them. Learn why good candidates disappear and how to design for both ATS and human readers.

item.title: Module 2: Resume Formatting — Layout Rules That Survive ATS Parsing
item.category: "Career Development" , "Resume Writing" , "Job Search" , "Professional Development"
item.description: Learn the formatting rules that ensure your resume gets parsed correctly by ATS systems. Covers layout, fonts, margins, section headers, and the common formatting traps that send good resumes to the reject pile.

item.title: Module 3: Writing Your Resume Summary — The Section Read First and Remembered Longest
item.category: "Career Development" , "Resume Writing" , "Job Search" , "Professional Development"
item.description: Learn how to write a resume summary that states your value clearly in 2–4 sentences, mirrors the language of your target role, and passes the copy-paste test. Includes the formula, examples, and common mistakes.

item.title: Module 4: Bullet Points and Accomplishments — Evidence, Not Job Descriptions
item.category: "Career Development" , "Resume Writing" , "Job Search" , "Professional Development"
item.description: Learn how to write resume bullet points that demonstrate accomplishments with evidence instead of listing duties. Covers the Action + What + Result formula, strong verbs, how to quantify when you don't have exact numbers, and bullet length rules.

item.title: Module 5: Keywords and the Skills Section — Where Keywords Go and How to Find Them
item.category: "Career Development" , "Resume Writing" , "Job Search" , "Professional Development"
item.description: Learn how to find the right keywords from any job description, where to place them in your resume for maximum ATS impact, and how to structure a skills section that recruiters can scan in 5 seconds.

item.title: Module 6: Experience, Projects, and Education — The Section-by-Section Resume Guide
item.category: "Career Development" , "Resume Writing" , "Job Search" , "Professional Development"
item.description: A complete guide to the three main resume content sections — Experience, Projects, and Education. Covers what to include, how to handle gaps and contract work, when to elevate projects, and what to omit from each section.

item.title: Module 7: Tailoring Your Resume — How to Target a Job Without Rewriting Everything
item.category: "Career Development" , "Resume Writing" , "Job Search" , "Professional Development"
item.description: Learn how to tailor your resume to a specific job description efficiently. Covers the five concrete changes that move ATS scores, the 70% keyword threshold, maintaining base resume versions, and what tailoring actually means vs. what it doesn't.

item.title: Module 8: Cover Letters — When to Write One and How to Write One That Gets Read
item.category: "Career Development" , "Resume Writing" , "Job Search" , "Professional Development"
item.description: Learn when a cover letter is worth writing, the three-section structure that works, the tone that reads human instead of AI-generated, and 20+ phrases to eliminate from every cover letter you write.

item.title: Module 9: Final Checklist and Submission — Pre-Send Verification and File Format Rules
item.category: "Career Development" , "Resume Writing" , "Job Search" , "Professional Development"
item.description: The complete pre-submission checklist for your resume. Covers page count rules by experience level, PDF vs. DOCX submission guidelines, file naming conventions, the 10 most common resume mistakes, and a quick-reference word replacement table.

item.title: Resume Optimization Course: Beat ATS Systems and Land More Interviews
item.category: "Career Development" , "Resume Writing" , "Job Search" , "Professional Development" , "Productivity"
item.description: A practical, no-fluff course on writing a resume that gets past ATS filters and lands interviews. Covers formatting, keywords, bullet points, cover letters, and using AI tools to optimize your chances.

item.title: Software Development Career Playbook: From First Commit to Engineering Lead
item.category: "software development career" , "software engineering" , "career playbook" , "programming" , "developer career" , "career guidance" , "professional development"
item.description: A comprehensive guide to launching, growing, and leading a software development career. Covers programming languages, education paths, job searching, career advancement, and engineering leadership.

item.title: Cybersecurity Certifications Comparison 2026: Complete Vendor Guide
item.category: "Cybersecurity" , "IT Certifications" , "Career Development" , "Professional Training" , "Information Security" , "Technology Education" , "Security Training" , "IT Career Path" , "Professional Development" , "Certification Guide"
item.description: Comprehensive comparison of cybersecurity certification vendors including CompTIA, Offensive Security, ISC2, SANS, AWS, Azure, HackTheBox, and more with pricing, ROI analysis, and career path recommendations for 2026.

item.title: Unlocking Cybersecurity Success: Navigating Careers with Certifications
item.category: "Career Development" , "Cybersecurity Education" , "Remote Work Insights" , "Certification Strategies" , "IT Career Growth" , "Job Transition Tips" , "Professional Development" , "Technology Careers" , "Cybersecurity Certification" , "Work-from-home Success"
item.description: Discover the key to a thriving cybersecurity career! Learn the impact of certifications and how to secure remote opportunities. Dive into a future of success now!

item.title: Career Climb: Navigating IT Certification Updates Effectively
item.category: "Career Advancement" , "IT Certifications" , "Professional Development" , "Tech Industry Insights" , "Certification Management" , "IT Skill Enhancement" , "Career Resources" , "Tech Education" , "Certification Training" , "IT Job Market Trends"
item.description: Unlock your IT career's full potential by mastering the art of certification updates. Our guide helps you maintain an edge in the competitive tech industry.

item.title: The Best Homelab Hardware: Building a Powerful and Budget-Friendly Setup
item.category: "Technology" , "Education" , "Innovation" , "Skill Development" , "Home Learning" , "Personal Growth" , "Experimentation" , "IT Enthusiast" , "Professional Development" , "Tech Exploration"
item.description: Discover the power of hands-on learning with a budget-friendly tech homelab setup. Explore hardware options, networking, and innovation in this comprehensive guide.

item.title: help Your Expertise: Essential Books for Cybersecurity & IT Pros
item.category: "Technology" , "Education" , "Books" , "Cybersecurity" , "Programming" , "IT" , "Automation" , "Professional Development" , "Career Growth" , "Learning"
item.description: Boost your skills with top Cybersecurity, Automation, Programming, and IT books.

item.title: Are Google Career Certificates Worth It? Unlocking Success in Tech
item.category: "Technology Careers" , "Professional Development" , "Online Education" , "IT Support" , "Cybersecurity" , "Skills Training" , "Industry-Recognized Certifications" , "Job Market" , "Career Growth" , "Technology Skills"
item.description: Discover the value of Google Career Certificates in today's tech-driven world and explore their benefits for career growth and advancement.

item.title: Unlock Your Career Potential with Free Oracle Certifications for Cybersecurity and IT Professionals
item.category: "Cybersecurity" , "IT Certifications" , "Professional Development" , "Oracle Certifications" , "Cloud Computing" , "Data Management" , "Career Advancement" , "Online Learning" , "Technology Education"
item.description: Discover the value of free Oracle certifications for cybersecurity and IT professionals, and explore the opportunities they offer for career advancement in Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI).

item.title: Network Plus Course:
item.category: "CompTIA Network Plus" , "IT Certification" , "Cybersecurity" , "Data Security" , "Network Administration" , "Technology Education" , "Professional Development" , "Digital Skills" , "Information Technology" , "Online Learning"
item.description: Learn the best practices for secure asset disposal in network security, including factory reset, wiping configurations, and sanitization methods to ensure data security.

item.title: Network Plus Course: Wireless Security and IoT Access
item.category: "CompTIA Network Plus Certification Exam" , "Wireless Security" , "IoT Access" , "MAC Filtering" , "Antenna Placement" , "Power Levels" , "Client Isolation" , "Guest Network Isolation" , "Preshared Keys" , "EAP" , "Geofencing" , "Captive Portal" , "IoT Security" , "Wireless Networks" , "Cybersecurity" , "IT Certification" , "Networking Fundamentals" , "Information Technology" , "Online Learning" , "Professional Development"
item.description: Enhance your knowledge of wireless security and IoT access with this comprehensive Network+ course. Learn about MAC filtering, antenna placement, power level configuration, preshared keys, EAP, geofencing, and IoT device security.

item.title: CEH Certification Exam Study Plan: Tips and Strategies
item.category: "Cybersecurity" , "Information Security" , "Professional Development" , "IT Certification" , "Network Security" , "Ethical Hacking" , "Exam Preparation" , "Study Plan" , "Time Management" , "Career Advancement"
item.description: Learn how to create an effective study plan for passing the CEH certification exam with tips and strategies for success.

item.title: Should You Learn Programming for IT and Cyber Security?
item.category: "IT and Cyber Security" , "Programming Skills" , "Career Advancement" , "Automation" , "Command Line" , "Scripting" , "Infrastructure Deployment" , "Data Analysis" , "Security Testing" , "Professional Development"
item.description: Learn why mastering programming skills can greatly benefit your IT and Cyber Security career, and how to get started with PowerShell, Bash, Python, Ansible, Packer, and Terraform.
